/blog/queue-and-steer-messages-while-age.title: Line up your next moves while an agent works — steer or reorder them mid-run
/blog/queue-and-steer-messages-while-age.description: Type follow-ups while a turn is running: they queue in a strip above the composer and send in order when the agent goes idle, or you can steer, edit, reorder, and delete them.

/docs/build/harnesses.title: Harnesses
/docs/build/harnesses.description: The harness is the runtime that executes your agent loop. Swap one line of YAML to switch between Claude, Codex, Cursor, and more — or ship your own as a community plugin.

/docs/build/models.title: Models & Credentials
/docs/build/models.description: Declare your model in agent YAML and let Omnigent manage the credentials that authenticate to each provider.

/docs/build/prompts.title: Prompts & Skills
/docs/build/prompts.description: Shape agent behavior with system prompts, and extend it with skills: reusable instruction sets the agent loads on demand.

/docs/build/routing.title: Smart Routing
/docs/build/routing.description: Let a router pick the best harness and model for each session automatically, using the built-in judge or an external routing API.

/docs/build/scheduled-tasks.title: Scheduled Tasks
/docs/build/scheduled-tasks.description: Run an agent on a recurring schedule. A scheduled task is a saved prompt that fires an agent session on an RRULE cadence until you delete it.

/docs/build/tools.title: MCP & Tools
/docs/build/tools.description: Give your agent capabilities beyond conversation. Declare tools and MCP servers in your agent YAML, each with a name you choose.

/docs/collaborate/auth.title: Auth & SSO
/docs/collaborate/auth.description: Authenticate users in Omnigent three ways. Pick the approach that fits your setup, from simple tokens to full SSO.

/docs/collaborate.title: Pair Programming
/docs/collaborate.description: Omnigent is multi-user: share a live session by link, let a teammate co-drive, or fork a conversation across terminal, web, and mobile.

/docs/deploy/cloud-sandbox-host.title: Cloud Sandbox Host
/docs/deploy/cloud-sandbox-host.description: Move the Omnigent runner from your laptop to a remote container so your agent keeps working in an isolated cloud environment.

/docs/deploy/database.title: Database
/docs/deploy/database.description: The Omnigent server persists session history, accounts, and artifacts. Choose between Postgres and SQLite, with the same schema and migrations.

/docs/deploy/overview.title: Shared Server
/docs/deploy/overview.description: Deploy the Omnigent server so your agents are reachable from your phone, shareable with teammates, and running while your laptop sleeps.

/docs/deploy/telemetry.title: Usage Telemetry
/docs/deploy/telemetry.description: What anonymous usage telemetry the Omnigent server collects, and every way to turn it off.

/docs/interact/desktop.title: Desktop App
/docs/interact/desktop.description: The Omnigent desktop app brings the full web UI to a native window, with notifications, a dock badge, and multiple windows.

/docs/interact/mobile.title: Mobile
/docs/interact/mobile.description: Use Omnigent on your phone: the native iOS app from the App Store, or the mobile web UI in any phone browser. Start a session on your laptop, continue it on your phone.

/docs/interact/slack.title: Slack
/docs/interact/slack.description: Talk to your Omnigent agents from Slack: set up the bot, map threads to sessions, stream replies, and approve tool calls without leaving your workspace.

/docs/interact/terminal.title: Terminal
/docs/interact/terminal.description: Omnigent's keyboard-first default interface, with streaming output and real-time tool execution for people who live in the terminal.

/docs/interact/web-ui.title: Web UI
/docs/interact/web-ui.description: The Omnigent web UI starts automatically with every session; open the printed URL in any browser to work with your agent.

/docs/omnibox.title: Omnibox
/docs/omnibox.description: Omnibox is Omnigent's secure OS-level sandbox that wraps any agent to run it unattended without exposing your credentials, files, or network.

/docs/policies/builtin.title: Builtin Policies
/docs/policies/builtin.description: Built-in Omnigent policies for common safety and cost-control guardrails. Apply them by name or reference them in YAML.

/docs/policies/custom.title: Custom Policies
/docs/policies/custom.description: When built-in policies aren't enough, write your own in Python, register them on the server, and use them like builtins.

/docs/policies/os-sandbox.title: Omnibox (OS Sandbox)
/docs/policies/os-sandbox.description: Omnibox is Omnigent's secure OS sandbox: restrict filesystem and network access and hide credentials for unattended, locked-down agents.

/docs/policies/overview.title: Contextual Policies
/docs/policies/overview.description: Policies control what your Omnigent can do, intercepting every action to allow, ask for approval, or deny it in real time.

/docs/use/builtin-agents/debby.title: Debby
/docs/use/builtin-agents/debby.description: Debby asks two models the same question and runs a multi-round debate where each critiques and refines the other's answer.

/docs/use/builtin-agents.title: Built-in Multi-AI Agents
/docs/use/builtin-agents.description: Omnigent ships with multi-agent orchestrators that combine different AI agents into a single workflow, ready to run out of the box.

/docs/use/builtin-agents/polly.title: Polly
/docs/use/builtin-agents/polly.description: Polly is a supervisor that delegates sub-tasks to sub-agents on separate harnesses and worktrees, with cross-agent review and human-decided merges.

/docs/use/coding-agents.title: Coding Agents
/docs/use/coding-agents.description: Run Claude Code or Codex through Omnigent with one command and get a web UI, persistent sessions, collaboration, mobile, and policies.

/docs/use/custom-agents.title: Custom Agents
/docs/use/custom-agents.description: Define a custom agent in a short YAML file, with no code or frameworks, and get the full Omnigent platform around it.

/faq.title: FAQ
/faq.description: Answers to common questions about Omnigent: what it is, how it works, and how to get started.

/privacy.title: Privacy Notice
/privacy.description: How Omnigent collects and processes personal information.

/quickstart/coding-agent.title: Tutorial: Coding Agent
/quickstart/coding-agent.description: Tutorial: see what Omnigent adds on top of Claude Code or Codex, including a web UI, mobile access, session sharing, and mid-conversation agent switching.

/quickstart/collaborate.title: Tutorial: Collaborate from Anywhere
/quickstart/collaborate.description: Tutorial: deploy a server to access agents from your phone, share live sessions with teammates, and run agents on cloud sandbox hosts.

/quickstart/install.title: Install
/quickstart/install.description: Install the Omnigent CLI with a single command — via the installer script, uv, pip, or Homebrew — and grab the macOS desktop app.

/quickstart/policies.title: Tutorial: Contextual Policies
/quickstart/policies.description: Tutorial: attach context-aware policies to a live session to warn on spend, pause for approval, or block risky actions, with no code required.

/quickstart/polly.title: Tutorial: Polly (Multi-AI Coding)
/quickstart/polly.description: Tutorial: see Polly in practice, a multi-agent coding orchestrator that delegates sub-tasks across AI agents with built-in cross-vendor review.

/releases/0.2.0.title: Omnigent v0.2.0
/releases/0.2.0.description: Omnigent v0.2.0 adds pluggable agent SDKs, broader sandbox and deployment support, and security hardening.

/releases/0.3.0.title: Omnigent v0.3.0
/releases/0.3.0.description: Omnigent v0.3.0 adds seven agent harnesses, native-harness parity, desktop workspace management, and more deployment targets.

/releases/0.4.0.title: Omnigent v0.4.0
/releases/0.4.0.description: Omnigent v0.4.0 introduces the harness plugin SDK, expands Polly orchestration, and improves native agent UX, security, and deployment.

/releases/0.5.0.title: Omnigent v0.5.0
/releases/0.5.0.description: Omnigent v0.5.0 brings iOS, message queuing and steering, Git worktree sessions, an embedded browser, and more.

/releases/0.6.0.title: Omnigent v0.6.0
/releases/0.6.0.description: Omnigent v0.6.0 adds richer file previews, custom themes, chat imports, Slack integration, and Windows and Linux desktop apps.

/releases.title: Releases
/releases.description: What's new in each version of Omnigent — release highlights, version by version.
